title: Welcome to Tigerpaw
subtitle: Let's get you set up in a few quick steps.
gatewayOffline: Gateway offline — selections will be saved when connected

ai.title: Configure Your AI
ai.description: AI powers all of Tigerpaw — the assistant (Jarvis), workflows, trading commands, analysis, and smart features. Choose one or more providers.
ai.ollamaDesc: Free — runs on your machine, no API key
ai.googleDesc: Free tier available — requires API key
ai.groqDesc: Free tier available — requires API key
ai.lmstudioDesc: Free — runs on your machine, no API key
ai.notDetected: Not detected — start the service first
ai.securityNote: Your API key is stored locally and never sent to any third party.
ai.testHint: We'll make a lightweight API call to verify your key.
ai.skipWarning: AI powers all of Tigerpaw — the assistant, workflows, trading commands, and smart features. Without a provider, most features won't work.

messaging.title: Connect a Messaging Channel
messaging.description: Connect a chat platform so Tigerpaw can send you notifications, alerts, and trade confirmations.
messaging.clickToConnect: Click a channel to configure it. Each channel has its own setup guide.
messaging.securityNote: Your token is stored locally on this device.

trading.title: Connect a Trading Platform
trading.description: Optional — link an exchange or broker to enable trading features, portfolio tracking, and risk controls.
trading.clickToConnect: Click a platform to configure it. Each has its own setup guide and credentials.
trading.securityNote: Your exchange credentials are stored locally and never shared.

complete.title: You're all set!
complete.description: You can always change these settings later from the configuration page.
complete.howToStart: How would you like to start?

examples.chatJarvisDesc: Ask your AI assistant anything — questions, tasks, or conversations
examples.dailyBriefingDesc: Morning summary of portfolio, markets, and channel activity
examples.createWorkflowDesc: Automate tasks with event triggers — price alerts, scheduled reports
examples.sendMessageDesc: Message your connected channels directly from the dashboard
examples.notificationsDesc: Get alerts on Discord, Telegram, or Slack for important events
examples.checkPortfolioDesc: Ask 'What's my portfolio?' in any connected channel
examples.marketPricesDesc: Track crypto and stock prices in real-time on the dashboard
examples.riskControlsDesc: Set daily spend caps, position limits, and kill switch thresholds
examples.paperTradeDesc: Practice with simulated money before going live
examples.chatTradingDesc: Use 8 trading bot commands from any messaging channel
